Insulin Pump Maker Insulet's Growth Catalysts Set to Boost Revenue in 2025: Analyst
data.description: Insulet reported a Q2 adjusted EPS of $0.55, slightly missing estimates but showing strong sales growth of 23.2% year-over-year, driven by Omnipod revenue. The company raised its 2024 revenue guidance, citing continued momentum and future growth catalysts.

data.title: US Natural Gas Prices Eye Fourth Session Of Gains As Lower Supply, Persistent Heat Sustain Bulls: More Gains To Follow?
data.description: U.S. natural gas prices rise for fourth consecutive session on lower inventory builds and increased demand due to heat. Supply remains a concern.
